topics.title: Listener Reactions and Media Disputes
topics.summary: The studio reviews listener feedback regarding recent guests, discusses the complexities of a high-profile murder case, and addresses personal grievances involving media reports and public appearances.

topics.title: Refuting False Media Reports
topics.summary: The studio addresses a fabricated news story regarding a missed funeral, clarifying that the host remained with an injured girlfriend in the hospital while debunking claims of a lack of concern for his producer.

topics.title: Production Logistics and Script Development
topics.summary: The studio discusses the production of a radio theater piece, including script revisions, catering arrangements, and a logistical failure regarding an elderly actress's appearance.

topics.title: Logistical Failures Regarding Mrs. Stern
topics.summary: The studio discusses the organizational failures and lack of communication regarding a recording session for Mrs. Stern, leading to her being left waiting without a script or meal.

topics.title: Radio Show Tapes and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including a discussion on meditation, the airing of past call-in tapes from other radio shows, and a conversation regarding Wendy Williams' upcoming film.

topics.title: Media Branding and Celebrity Roast Tapes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the implications of using a trademarked title for a film project, critiques professional headshots, and reacts to leaked audio of Andy Dick's behavior backstage at a roast.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming roast jokes involving celebrities like Andy Dick and William Shatner while reviewing news items including a celebrity court appearance, real estate listings, and various comedy bits.

topics.title: Mary Carrie Interview
topics.summary: The show features an interview with Mary Carrie, who discusses her weight loss after stopping birth control, her family history, and a recent appearance at a party.

topics.title: Interview with Mary Carrie and Bloodhound Gang
topics.summary: The show features an interview with intoxicated guest Mary Carrie followed by a discussion with members of the Bloodhound Gang regarding their touring experiences and stage antics.

topics.title: Bloodhound Gang Performance and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio hosts a discussion with members of the Bloodhound Gang regarding their stage antics, musical style, and personal stories involving public performances and private habits.

topics.title: Mark's Personal Life and Career
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Mark discusses his personal history, an interaction with a local official regarding his private life, and a potential collaboration involving a woman from his past.

topics.title: Carnegie Hall Ticket Sales
topics.summary: The show features a repetitive declaration regarding the rapid sell-out of tickets for a performance at Carnegie Hall.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio features a game where guests identify fake celebrity stories, followed by a prank call to an adult bookstore and a brief news segment.

topics.title: Radio Career Advice and News Segment
topics.summary: The studio discusses a former FBI agent's legal issues, the reality of underage drinking at parties, and provides career advice to a young listener aspiring to enter the radio industry.

topics.title: Radio Career Advice and Sports Commentary
topics.summary: The studio provides critiques on a caller's broadcasting style, discusses the importance of having an interesting point of view over a polished voice, and covers news regarding a mascot injuring a quarterback.

topics.title: Massage Parlor Experiences and Comedy News
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding personal experiences in massage parlors followed by news segments on comedy festival bans and aviation security.

topics.title: Current Events and Comedy Roast Highlights
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the survival of lost fishermen, sports endorsements, legal settlements, celebrity news, 9/11 footage releases, and highlights from the Roast of William Shatner.
